name: gecko-honeypot-generator
description: Adversarial-input corpus generator for crypto trading agents — typo, unicode lookalike, hidden char, mint substitution, and contract honeypot patterns. Built as Gecko's validation harness for adopting Bento Guard as our on-chain security guardrail; on our own bot exposed an 8% mint-substitution bypass that hardcoded allowlists alone don't catch.
author: Gecko
triggers: Generate adversarial inputs for my trading agent
Test my bot against honeypot tokens
Show me typo variants of PYTH
Build an adversarial corpus for security testing
